summary: Good‑quality soundboard capture of a strong Red Rocks run, highlighted by an all‑time Scarlet Begonias and solid second‑set gems.
review: The SBD source is now properly pitched and patched, delivering clear, well‑balanced audio with only minor mixing quirks in the first set. Musically the show shines – Scarlet Begonias ranks among the top five ever, and the second set delivers standout performances of See See Rider, Me & My Uncle, Eyes of the World and a stellar drum duet.

ai_rating.rationale: The review praises many musical moments (high show weight) while noting only modest recording issues, resulting in an overall strong rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: New SBD is correctly pitched and patched; earlier AUD sources were wobbly. Minor first‑set mix problem noted, but overall clear and well balanced with a great headphone‑friendly drum segment.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set is short and a bit uneven (B‑ rating), while the second set builds momentum with several peaks, earning a B+; overall the show feels tight and memorable.

band_member_comments.Jerry: Outstanding solo on Scarlet Begonias with multiple transpositions and reverse phrasing; on‑game during Eyes of the World.
band_member_comments.Bob: Uses slide sparingly early in the set; flubs Estimated Prophet later in the second set.
band_member_comments.Keys: Brent gets room to shine on Big River, contributing solid keyboard textures.
band_member_comments.Drums: Drums segment praised as top‑20 all time and sounds superb on headphones.
